title: Nvidia says its forecast for $200 billion CPU market includes China
summary: Nvidia's $200 billion CPU market forecast includes significant demand from China, signaling confidence in long-term processor demand despite geopolitical tensions. The forecast reflects sustained market opportunities beyond current trade uncertainties.
content: Nvidia's latest forecast signals it still sees significant long-term demand for central processing units.

zh.title: 英伟达表示其200亿美元CPU市场预测包括中国
zh.summary: 英伟达的200亿美元CPU市场预测包括来自中国的巨大需求，表明尽管地缘政治紧张局势，但对长期处理器需求充满信心。该预测反映了超越当前贸易不确定性的持续市场机遇。

title: High fuel prices test limits of summer vacation spending
summary: High fuel prices are testing consumer willingness to pay for summer travel as the season kicks off over Memorial Day weekend. Airline demand and ticket prices during this period will reveal how much travelers prioritize vacations despite fuel costs.
content: The unofficial start of the summer travel season on Memorial Day weekend will show just how much travelers want to fly and how much they're willing to pay.

zh.title: 高油价考验暑期度假支出的极限
zh.summary: 随着纪念日周末暑期旅游季的开始，高油价正在考验消费者为暑期旅行支付的意愿。这一时期的航空公司需求和机票价格将揭示旅行者在燃油成本影响下对度假的优先程度。

title: Three signs from APEC that the U.S. and China remain far apart on trade
summary: Despite recent diplomatic meetings between U.S. and Chinese officials following the Trump-Xi summit, APEC discussions reveal persistent disagreements on trade priorities. The gap between the two nations' positions suggests prolonged trade tensions ahead.
content: U.S. and Chinese officials have met and spoken publicly about differing priorities since the Trump-Xi summit concluded in Beijing last week.

zh.title: 亚太经合组织的三个迹象表明美国和中国在贸易方面仍相差甚远
zh.summary: 尽管在特朗普-习近平峰会后美中官员进行了最近的外交会议，但亚太经合组织讨论显示在贸易优先事项上存在持续的分歧。两国立场之间的差距表明贸易紧张局势将持续。

title: Magnitude 6 earthquake strikes Hawaii’s Big Island; USGS assessing Kilauea volcano
summary: A magnitude 6 earthquake struck Hawaii's Big Island, prompting USGS assessment of nearby Kilauea, one of the world's most active volcanoes. The geological survey will determine whether seismic activity poses volcanic eruption risks.
content: Kilauea, one of the world's most active volcanoes, is located on Hawaii's Big Island.

zh.title: 6级地震袭击夏威夷大岛；美国地质调查局评估基拉韦厄火山
zh.summary: 6级地震袭击夏威夷大岛，促使美国地质调查局对附近的基拉韦厄火山进行评估，该火山是世界上最活跃的火山之一。地质调查将确定地震活动是否存在火山喷发风险。

title: Temperatures are rising - and so are ice cream prices
summary: Rising temperatures across the country are driving up ice cream prices as summer demand increases. The price surge reflects seasonal demand pressures as consumers seek cooling treats during hotter weather.
content: Temperatures are rising across the country, and so is the price of ice cream - but by how much?

zh.title: 气温在上升——冰淇淋价格也在上升
zh.summary: 全国气温上升导致冰淇淋价格上涨，因为夏季需求增加。价格上涨反映了季节性需求压力，消费者在炎热天气中寻求冰冷饮品。

title: The Leeds designer outlet that's 15 miles from Leeds
summary: A rebranding of Junction 32 retail park near Castleford has drawn local backlash despite being marketed as a Leeds designer outlet located 15 miles away. The rebrand appears to have missed expectations among nearby residents.
content: A rebrand of the junction 32 retail park off the M62 has gone down poorly with some locals in Castleford.

zh.title: 距离利兹15英里的利兹设计师折扣店
zh.summary: 靠近卡斯尔福德的Junction 32零售园的重新品牌化尽管被宣传为距离利兹15英里的利兹设计师折扣店，但引起了当地的反弹。这次重新品牌化似乎未能达到附近居民的预期。

title: SpaceX launches Starship test flight on second try
summary: SpaceX successfully launched its massive Starship rocket on Friday, a day after scrubbing the previous attempt. The test flight advances the company's development of its next-generation heavy-lift launch vehicle.
content: SpaceX launched its massive Starship rocket on Friday, a day after the company scrubbed plans before takeoff.

zh.title: SpaceX第二次尝试成功发射星舰测试飞行
zh.summary: SpaceX在周五成功发射其巨大的星舰火箭,该公司在前一天取消了发射计划。此次测试飞行推进了该公司下一代重型运载火箭的开发。
